title: Vietnamese Chicken Pho
description: A delicious and comforting Vietnamese noodle soup made with chicken, herbs, and spices. Serve with your choice of garnishes, such as bean sprouts, lime wedges, and fresh herbs.

ingredients.name: fresh herbs
ingredients.notes: such as basil, mint, and lime wedges for serving

instructions: Bring the chicken broth to a boil in a large pot.
Reduce the heat to a simmer and add the sliced chicken. Cook for 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
Cook the pho noodles according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a small pan, heat some oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add the sliced onion to the pan and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until softened.
To assemble the pho, place some noodles in a bowl, then add slices of chicken and some of the hot broth.
Garnish with bean sprouts, fresh herbs, and a squeeze of lime juice.
If using, add some fish sauce, soy sauce, and sugar to taste.
Adjust the seasoning as needed and serve hot.
